## Mobile QA Checklist (test on real device before merge)

> **Instructions:** Open the preview URL on a real phone (iOS Safari + Android Chrome). Check each item. If any fail, do NOT merge.

- [ ] Map loads within 3 seconds
- [ ] Can tap map to set origin
- [ ] Can tap map to set destination
- [ ] Search bar is accessible and typeable
- [ ] Route results appear in bottom sheet
- [ ] Touch targets feel comfortable (not too small)
- [ ] No horizontal scroll
- [ ] BOOST/Turbo NOT visible
- [ ] Animations feel smooth (no jank)
- [ ] Preview URL tested: _______________
